_meta.name: native-connector-precedence-map
_meta.purpose: Maps workspace-mcp tool verbs to their native Anthropic-connector equivalents. Used by native-connector-precedence-check.sh PreToolUse hook to block workspace-mcp calls when a native equivalent exists.

mcp__google-workspace__search_gmail_mess.note: Use native search_threads. Returns same thread metadata. Native is pre-authenticated via Anthropic OAuth.

mcp__google-workspace__get_gmail_message.note: Use native get_thread. Returns full message content.

mcp__google-workspace__draft_gmail_messa.note: Native create_draft handles single-draft creation. For batched drafts, fallback is allowed.

mcp__google-workspace__manage_gmail_labe.note: Native has separate verbs per action. Pick the right one based on intent.

mcp__google-workspace__modify_gmail_mess.note: Native has thread-level and message-level label ops.

mcp__google-workspace__get_events.note: Native uses list_events with calendar_id filter.

mcp__google-workspace__manage_event.note: Native has separate verbs per action.

mcp__google-workspace__search_drive_file.note: Native search_files supports Drive query syntax.

mcp__google-workspace__list_drive_items.note: Native list_recent_files is recency-ordered. For folder-listing use search_files with folder filter.

mcp__google-workspace__get_drive_file_do.note: Native returns content directly rather than URL. Adjust caller accordingly.

mcp__google-workspace__check_drive_file_.note: Native returns full permission list including public-access state.

mcp__google-workspace__search_docs.note: Native search_files with file_type='document' achieves same result.

mcp__google-workspace__create_spreadshee.note: Native create_file makes a Google Sheet directly: pass text/csv content and it auto-converts to a spreadsheet (verified 2026-07-08), or create an empty one via mimeType application/vnd.google-apps.spreadsheet. Always on brientate@gmail.com. Fall back to workspace-mcp modify_sheet_values / format_sheet_range only for cell-level writes and formatting on the already-created file.

mcp__google-workspace__create_doc.note: Native create_file makes a Google Doc directly: pass text/html or text/plain content and it auto-converts, or create empty via mimeType application/vnd.google-apps.document. Fall back to workspace-mcp batch_update_doc / modify_doc_text only for in-place structured editing.

mcp__google-workspace__create_drive_fold.note: Native create_file with mimeType application/vnd.google-apps.folder creates a folder.

fallback_allowed._note: These workspace-mcp verbs have NO native equivalent. They are legitimate fallback uses. Hook allows them without warning.
